programme.title: Madhoshi
programme.desc: While talking to her parents over the telephone, a young woman and her husband perish in the September 11th attack on the World Trade Center the family back in India must try to deal with their loss.

programme.title: Dedh Ishqiya
programme.desc: Khalujan and Babban seek refuge at the Majidabad palace as they run from the law. Khalujan tries to woo a wealthy widow with poetry, Babban and the widow's assistant plan a kidnapping.

programme.title: Luck
programme.desc: Musa, an underworld kingpin and a firm believer in luck, designs a series of life threatening adventure sports with hefty prize money for people around the world. However, the participants can only survive and win if they are exceptionally lucky.

programme.title: Jaan-E-Mann: Let's Fall in Love... Again
programme.desc: Salman Khan, Akshay KumarPreity Zinta, Anupam Kher, Soni Razdan, Aman Verma, Jawed Sheikh, Priyanka Shenoy, Rajesh Balwani
